image.title: NAMP Vizcaychipi, CL Shovlin, A McCarthy, A Godfrey, S Patel, PL Shah, M Hayes, RT Keays, I Beveridge, G Davies, NA

item.title: Increase in COVID-19 inpatient survival following detection of Thromboembolic and Cytokine storm risk from the point of admission to hospital by a near real time Traffic-light System (TraCe-Tic).
